{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Alin's sword
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin's sword]] has a blade formed from interlocking planes of golden light.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
